column2: Also referred to as Passive Abilities, these are innate traits or conditional modifiers that are always active or automatically triggered without direct player input.

column3: In-Game Description
column4: Functionality

column3: Gain increased damage and speed at the cost of disabled stamina regeneration while on low health
column4:
(HP must be below 25%)
- 20% damage increase
- 1.25x overall speed 
- Disables stamina regeneration

column3: While swimming, your stamina regen and stamina amounts are increased, you also have more oxygen
column4:
(only activates in water)
- 1.75x speed boost
- Increase oxygen bar capacity by 45
- 2x stamina regen
- 1.5x Stamina

column3: At low health, your stamina regeneration and attack speed increase
column4:
(HP must be below 20%)
- stamina regen 2x
- attack speed increased by 2x (faster bite)

column3: The ability to resist breath
column4: - blocks a % of any breath's damage (not ailments/status)

column3: Periodically strikes the user with lightning while on low health, shocking any nearby players
column4:
- Activates when below 25% health 
- Lightning strikes every 5 seconds 
- Applies 2 Confusion (3s-6s Duration)
- Applies 2 Shock (3s-6s Duration)

column3: You are able to dive underwater for a breath moment while flying
column4:
- Allows the user to retain their flight speed underwater for a customizable duration 
- Allows the user to regenerate stamina if gliding into water during the duration 
- Cancels if the user runs into any obstacles

column3: While above 75% hp, deal increased damage.
column4:
- Only works above 75% hp
- Damage is increased by a customizable %

column3: During winter and fall you experience a weight and stamina regeneration buff
column4:
- Only active during Fall, Winter, and Famine
- Increases health regen by 25%
- Increases stamina regen by 25%
- Decreases hunger and thirst depletion by 25%

column3: When below a certain health threshold while in combat, you leave behind lingering clouds of light that inflict a random vision-distorting ailment on creatures that pass through them.
column4:
Each spawned cloud can apply the following Statuses:
- Confusion
- BlurredVision
- TunnelVision

column3: Allows the creature to overfill its primary appetite bar up to 1.5x. Overfilling increases weight, but also reduces speed, and causes the overfilled appetite bar to drain twice as fast.
column4:
- User gains up to 15% more weight based on overfill, capping at 1.25x capacity
- User loses up to 7.5% speed based on overfill, capping at 1.25x capacity
- Overfilled appetites drain twice 2x normal speed

column3: You take reduced damage from enemies
column4:
- The user takes 50% reduced damage from attacks
- Damage from breaths isn't reduced

column3: Leaves behind a trail which heals your packmates when hurt
column4:
- Activates under 65% health
- Heals a customizable % of health when stepped in
- Can heal the user 
- Cannot heal anyone outside of pack
- Trail segments last 8 seconds before disappearing

column3: Take heavily reduced damage from other players after strafing for 5 seconds at the cost of halving your own
column4:
- Must be strafing for 5 seconds to activate, and stopping causes the ability to stop
- Applies a persistent single stack of Hunker until conditions fall off

column3: You cannot receive negative ailments from eating rotten meat or drinking dirty water
An ability where you can temporarily see the health of those around you
column4: - Allows the user to see the health and ailments of all creatures in its radius

column3: You give players nearby you a buff to health regeneration
column4:
- increases packmate hp regen by 1.25x/+25%
- 125 stud radius

column3: Boosts health regeneration when you are heavily damaged
column4:
(at 40% or less hp)
- health regeneration 2x
- HP regen increase scales based on current hp, maxing at a 100% boost

column3: Allows the user to invade the burrows of other players
column4: - Cooldown of 5 seconds upon entering/exiting a burrow

column3: At very low health, gain a burst of movement speed. Upon death or expiration, explode to damage, burn, and heavily knock back nearby creatures. There is a 5 minute cooldown between activation.
column4:
At 15% HP, applies 3 stakcs of the SelfDestruct Status.
After it runs out:
- Sets HP of self to 5%
- Deals 10% maxHP damage to nearby creatures.
- Deals 10 Burn to nearby creatures.
- Applies 2 stacks of the Slowed Ailment to self.

column3: It is more difficult for your enemy to heal bleed while this ailment is active
column4: - Applies 10 Deep Wounds (28s-30s)

column3: Reduces the noise creatures make, making them harder to hear on the hearing wheel.
column4: Makes Sprinting/Flying appear as if the user is further away than they actually are.

column3: Reduces your fall speed after a jump or falling off a ledge
column4:
- Reduces fall speed by a customizable %
- Can be disabled by pressing the jump button midair

column3: An ability which lets the user fly in place without consuming stamina
column4:
- Only works on fliers
- Disables stamina drain while idle flying

column3: Your attacker deals damage to you at a reduced speed
column4: - Applies 10 stacks of Sticky Fur (28s-30s)

column3: Get extra health regen/stamina regen when in a pack
column4:
- Increases health regen by 7%
- Increases stamina regen by 7%
- Only members of the same species receive boosts

column3: Leaves behind a trail when on low health which poisons and damages whoever steps on it
column4:
- Activates when below a customizable health %
- Trail causes 1% damage and 3 poison every 3 seconds 
- Trail segments last 5 seconds

column3: You are immune to injury and bleed
column4:
- user is immune to bleed
- user is immune to injury

column3: You are immune to lava and have improved healing during famine and drought
column4:
- Makes the user immune to damage and burn from lava
- Only active during summer/drought
- Increases health regen by 50%
- Decreases hunger and thirst drain by 25%

column3: When below 50% health. Gain 100% block to all incoming ailments.
You are able to run with 0 stamina, at the cost of some health
column4:
- Only active once stamina is fully depleted 
- Drains 3% health every 3 seconds
- Health regen is disabled while active

column3: You apply a Shredded Wings ailment to your enemy, which knocks them out of the sky and makes it hard to fly
column4: - Applies variable stacks of Shredded Wings
